basic_details.job_title: JKPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission (JKPSC)
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Public Service Commission (JKPSC) Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) Notification 2026 has been released on 09 June 2026 on the official website of JKPSC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JKPSC Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation: Upper age limit upto 05 years relaxable for SC, ST & 03 years in case of OBC candidates. The upper age limit in respect of SKIMS employees shall be determined in terms of Government Order No. 09-SKIMS of 2013 dated 08.03.2013.

qualification.education_qualification: MD(Hospital Administration), 03 years teaching and research experience in a recognized institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of MD, 02 Publications in indexed journals
qualification.details: MD(Hospital Administration) 03 years teaching and research experience in a recognized institution in the subject of specialty after obtaining the qualifying degree of MD 02 Publications in indexed journals

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of JKPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JKPSC Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JKPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of JKPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JKPSC Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JKPSC Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the JKPSC Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) position is 11th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD in Hospital Administration, along with three years of teaching and research experience in a recognized institution after obtaining the MD degree, and two publications in indexed journals.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 50 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) post in this recruitment drive by JKPSC.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1200.00. Please ensure payment is made within the stipulated time frame.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67700 - 208700 per month, as per the government norms.

faq.question: Q7. When did the application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the JKPSC Assistant Professor (Hospital Administration) recruitment began on 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, upper age limit is relaxable by 05 years for SC/ST candidates and 03 years for OBC candidates. Specific rules apply to SKIMS employees.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section on this page, or directly from the JKPSC official website.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official JKPSC website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section, ensuring all required documents and fees are submitted before the last date.
